productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men White Shoes
description: Blunt toed, casual shoe in white with lace-up fastening, overlays, perforations, rivet detail and reinforced overlay at the heel counterPadded collar and tongue (with branding) and an ergonomically shaped insoleRubber midsoleTPU outsole with grooves and lugs and an upraised heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guard
